summary: The diff implements all four requirements reasonably well. REQ-1 (animated envelope), REQ-2 (letter panel styling), REQ-3 (dark radial gradient background), and REQ-4 (Google Fonts) are all addressed. There are minor implementation gaps versus the exact spec (e.g., inline styles vs. ::before/::after pseudo-elements, CSS variable naming), but the functional requirements are covered. One minor hallucinated feature (hint text / Poppins hint paragraph) was added beyond the spec, and the CSS variable is named --gold-hex instead of --gold as specified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Triangular flap implemented via ::before pseudo-element and two-tone panels via ::after pseudo-element as specified in the design.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff implements the flap and panels using inline-styled div elements rather than CSS ::before/::after pseudo-elements. While functionally similar, the spec explicitly requires pseudo-element implementation.

hallucinated_features.description: Hint text ('Click to open') rendered below the envelope when closed, styled with Poppins light font in gold.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any hint text or instructional label below the envelope. This was added beyond what was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: CSS variable --gold-hex used instead of --gold as specified in the constraints.
hallucinated_features.reason: The constraints specify the variable must be named --gold with value #d4af37, but the diff defines --gold-hex: #d4af37 instead.
